title: sphenopus divaricatus var. ehrenbergii
intro: Sphenopus divaricatus var. ehrenbergii, commonly known as the Eastern Sphenopus, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. It is a type of club moss that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sphenopus divaricatus var. ehrenbergii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
